name: Gold King Bullion
description_short: Gold King Bullion buys and sells precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) across 10 Arizona locations with competitive spot pricing and on-site electronic testing.
description_long:
Gold King Bullion is a precious metals retailer operating 10 locations throughout the Phoenix metropolitan area (Phoenix, Mesa, Tempe, Scottsdale, and Chandler). The company specializes in buying and selling physical bullion, coins, and jewelry, positioning itself as a local alternative to national online bullion dealers.

The company offers buy and sell services for gold coins (American Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Australian Kangaroos, and others), silver bullion, platinum, palladium, and specialty items. They provide real-time spot pricing updated daily, fractional coin options, and a gold value calculator on their website. Customers can sell items in-person at any location for immediate cash or check payment, or purchase bullion through their online shop with multiple payment methods (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, bank transfer).

Gold King Bullion differentiates through local, in-person transactions with same-day payment and on-site testing using advanced equipment (Thermo Fisher XRF Spectrometer). They claim to match or beat major national dealers like JM Bullion and APMEX on buy-from-you prices for high-volume items, and offer slightly undercut sell prices when inventory is available locally. The company operates 7 days per week across all locations and employs trained staff with pricing transparency.

The main caveat is that the company acknowledges their website pricing may not update in real-time—they explicitly state prices "move and spreads also move" and that their current website "is not taking this into account." They promised a new website by March 28, 2026 for accurate live pricing. Customers conducting serious transactions should contact locations directly for current rates rather than relying solely on posted prices.
address: Inside North Phoenix Pawn, 10620 N 19th Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85029

company_info.headquarters: Inside North Phoenix Pawn, 10620 N 19th Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85029

pros: 10 convenient local Arizona locations allow same-day in-person transactions and immediate cash payment without shipping delays
Advanced on-site testing equipment (Thermo Fisher XRF Spectrometer) provides transparent, verifiable metal purity assessment
Claims competitive pricing matching national dealers (JM Bullion, APMEX) on high-volume items with potential discounts on local inventory
Wide selection including fractional coins (tenth, quarter, half ounce), multiple coin types, and specialty items beyond standard bullion
7 days per week operating hours across all locations provide accessibility for working customers
Multiple payment and sale options: cash, checks, credit cards, and bank transfers both in-person and online
Free tools including live spot price charts, gold value calculator, and pricing guides for customer education
cons: Website explicitly acknowledges pricing is not updated in real-time and may be inaccurate—company states it's 'near impossible' to adjust on current site
Promised new website with accurate pricing was targeted for March 28, 2026, indicating existing technology limitations
Limited online shopping inventory compared to national dealers—company notes they may need to ship from off-site warehouse at full retail pricing
Sell prices (what customers pay) show wider markups than buy prices, typical for retail bullion but important for cost-conscious buyers
No clear information on return policies, authentication guarantees, or dispute resolution processes for online purchases
best_for: Arizona residents who want to liquidate gold, silver, or jewelry quickly with same-day cash payment without shipping
Local buyers seeking in-person verification of precious metals purity using advanced testing equipment
Investors comfortable with retail markups who value convenience of 10 nearby locations over online-only national dealers
diagnosis: Gold King Bullion is best for Arizona residents seeking local, in-person precious metals transactions with same-day payment and on-site verification. The main caveat is that their website pricing is not real-time and may be inaccurate—customers planning significant transactions should contact locations directly for current rates rather than relying on posted prices.
services: Buy gold coins at competitive spot-based prices with same-day cash payment
Sell gold bullion online or in-person with multiple payment methods
Buy and sell silver coins and bars across multiple purities and weights
On-site electronic gold purity testing using XRF Spectrometer
Gold value calculator tool for customer self-assessment
Live spot price charts for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium updated daily
Fractional gold coins (tenth, quarter, half ounce denominations)
Specialty bullion items including rare mint coins
Online shop with credit card and bank transfer payment options
Educational guides and articles about precious metals investing
